'''Roanda''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who was stationed aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. Roanda was killed in action during the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Roanda was honored at a funeral service along with fellow pilots [[Blue Eight (Defiance)|Blue Eight]], [[Smithy]], [[Voxx]] and [[Waudok]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
